essential.name: WeakAuras
essential.description: The addon framework. Every Balance Druid WA pack requires this. Non-negotiable.

essential.name: Details! Damage Meter
essential.description: Real-time DPS tracking. See your Starfall damage breakdown per pull. Essential for measuring AoE performance.

essential.name: BigWigs / LittleWigs
essential.description: Boss and dungeon timers. Know when adds spawn so you can pool AP. Critical for CD mapping.

essential.name: Plater Nameplates
essential.description: Shows DoT timers on enemy nameplates. See Moonfire/Sunfire duration on every target. Critical for multi-DoT management.

essential.name: Oi Balance Druid (Luxthos)
essential.description: Complete Balance Druid WA pack. Eclipse tracker, AP bar, Starfall timer, DoT tracker, cooldown display. The most popular boomkin WA.

essential.name: Eclipse Bar (Animated)
essential.description: Animated Eclipse state tracker. Shows current Eclipse, charges remaining, and optimal transition timing.

essential.name: Multi-DoT Tracker
essential.description: Track Moonfire and Sunfire on all targets. Shows remaining duration, targets missing DoTs. Critical for Shooting Stars procs.

recommended.name: Method Dungeon Tools (MDT)
recommended.description: Plan M+ routes with pull-by-pull mapping. Know which pulls get your CDs. The foundation of AoE planning.

recommended.name: Hekili Priority Helper
recommended.description: Real-time rotation suggestions. Shows when to Starfall vs Starsurge based on target count. The training wheels for AoE mastery.

recommended.name: Starfall Range Indicator
recommended.description: Visual indicator showing Starfall radius relative to your position. Know exactly which mobs are in your Starfall. AoE essential.

recommended.name: Simulationcraft
recommended.description: Export your character to SimC for exact stat weights and DPS simulations. Know your real numbers.

recommended.name: Raidbots Client
recommended.description: Cloud-based simming. Top Gear, Droptimizer, stat weight analysis. The companion to SimC addon.

recommended.name: OmniCD
recommended.description: Track party cooldowns. Know when your group has defensives up for big pulls. Essential for M+ coordination.

recommended.name: ElvUI
recommended.description: Complete UI replacement. Clean, minimal, configurable. Most top druids run ElvUI as their base.
